# Calculator Validation Procedure

When asked to validate or test the calculator, you must execute the following procedure:

## 1. Syntax Validation
First, run a quick syntax check on the JavaScript file to catch basic errors:
```bash
node -c script.js
```

## 2. Execution Plan
Next, you must use the provided reference document to run comprehensive tests. 
Read the reference doc at: `references/test-cases.md` (relative to this skill's folder).

Instruct the user to open `index.html` and guide them through validating the specific test cases outlined in that document, especially the Edge Cases.

Do not skip any steps. If the syntax check fails, stop and fix it before moving to manual testing.
